title: [Bug]: HTTP sink NGINX e2e runner should call certification_envelope with supported arguments
summary: The HTTP sink NGINX e2e runner passed an unsupported consumer_sequence keyword argument to the shared certification_envelope helper.
observed: After the NGINX runtime directory fix, the live HTTP sink NGINX e2e runner failed before sending requests with TypeError: certification_envelope() got an unexpected keyword argument 'consumer_sequence'.
expected: The runner should use only the documented certification_envelope helper arguments so the live HTTP sink e2e path reaches the actual HTTP endpoint verification.
reproduction: Run python scripts/run-http-sink-nginx-e2e.py --timeout-seconds 120 on the issue #344 branch after the tmpfs runtime directory fix and before removing the unsupported argument.
failing_test: tests/unit/test_http_nginx_test_container.py should exercise the runner message construction through a fake HttpSink so unsupported helper arguments fail in unit tests before Docker is needed.
impact: The defect blocks the local HTTP sink container e2e test after container startup. It does not affect production JetStream ACK behavior or the production HTTP sink implementation.
delivery_semantics: The runner fails before any HTTP request success is confirmed. The production sink still requires endpoint success before returning to the core runner.
security: The fix must keep the runner local-only, use fake payloads only, and avoid logging payloads, container identifiers, private endpoints, credentials, or local paths in public evidence.
acceptance: A focused unit test exercises message construction through a fake HttpSink without network or Docker.
The runner stops passing unsupported arguments to certification_envelope.
python scripts/run-http-sink-nginx-e2e.py --timeout-seconds 120 passes against the local Docker backend.
Sanitized failing and passing test evidence is posted to the GitHub bug report.
tests: Run python -m pytest tests/unit/test_http_nginx_test_container.py -q, scripts/check-sinks.sh, scripts/check.sh, and python scripts/run-http-sink-nginx-e2e.py --timeout-seconds 120.
documentation: No public documentation change is required unless the runner command contract changes.
closeout: Mark completed after the focused regression test and live Docker e2e runner pass, then merge the fix back into the issue #344 feature branch.
